#### [Hexalith\.EventStore\.Testing](index.md 'index')
### [Hexalith\.EventStore\.Testing\.Fakes](Hexalith.EventStore.Testing.Fakes.md 'Hexalith\.EventStore\.Testing\.Fakes')

## FakeEventPublisher Class

Fake implementation of [Hexalith\.EventStore\.Server\.Events\.IEventPublisher](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/dotnet/api/hexalith.eventstore.server.events.ieventpublisher 'Hexalith\.EventStore\.Server\.Events\.IEventPublisher') for unit testing\.
Tracks all publish calls for test assertions and supports configurable failure modes\.
Thread\-safe for concurrent multi\-tenant verification \(Story 4\.2\)\.

```csharp
public sealed class FakeEventPublisher : Hexalith.EventStore.Server.Events.IEventPublisher
```

Inheritance [System\.Object](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/dotnet/api/system.object 'System\.Object') &#129106; FakeEventPublisher

<a name='Hexalith.EventStore.Testing.Fakes.FakeEventPublisher.SetupPartialFailure(int,string)'></a>

## FakeEventPublisher\.SetupPartialFailure\(int, string\) Method

Configures the fake to fail on a specific event index \(0\-based\), simulating partial failure\.
Events before the failure index are "published" successfully\.

```csharp
public void SetupPartialFailure(int eventIndex, string failureMessage="Partial publication failure");
```
#### Parameters

<a name='Hexalith.EventStore.Testing.Fakes.FakeEventPublisher.SetupPartialFailure(int,string).eventIndex'></a>

`eventIndex` [System\.Int32](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/dotnet/api/system.int32 'System\.Int32')

The 0\-based index of the event that should fail\.

<a name='Hexalith.EventStore.Testing.Fakes.FakeEventPublisher.SetupPartialFailure(int,string).failureMessage'></a>

`failureMessage` [System\.String](https://learn.microsoft.com/en-us/dotnet/api/system.string 'System\.String')

The failure reason message\.
